summary.summary: Release v0.8.0: aggregates multiple feature additions and fixes (anonymous opt-out telemetry; therapy settings upload to Tidepool; Nightscout glucose delete propagation; optional override/adjustment confirmation dialogs; show in-progress bolus and cancel from Treatments view; context menus for swipeable history items; settings search scroll-to and highlight; unified bolus safety checks; Nightscout site-change event fixes; glucose smoothing window fix; and submodule updates). The patch also updates Config.xcconfig APP_DEV_VERSION ultimately to 0.7.0.20.
summary.userFacingImpact: This release bundles several user-visible features and bug fixes listed in the release notes (telemetry, Tidepool therapy settings upload, Nightscout delete propagation, UI/UX improvements, bolus safety/visibility, and algorithm fixes). In the repository config, APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig was incremented to 0.7.0.20 (previously 0.7.0.18 -> 0.7.0.19 in intermediate commits). If further verification of runtime behavior is required, human review is recommended.
